news-global-econ.title: Gold rises as buying interest counters concern over Hormuz clash
news-global-econ.description: Bullion traded near $4,720 an ounce, after ending the previous session marginally lower; the US struck military targets in Iran after the country fired on three navy destroyers sailing in the strait

news-global-econ.title: Stocks drop, oil rises: Asian markets react to rising Iran tensions
news-global-econ.description: Asian markets decline as Iran tensions rise, impacting stocks while oil prices increase amid concerns over energy supply disruptions.

news-global-econ.title: Anthony Fauci blames Americans for not hitting his COVID vaccine target while ignoring other countries
news-global-econ.description: Fauci says anti-vax culture kept the US from reaching 72% vaccination, but highly vaccinated countries still saw record COVID hospitalizations.

news-global-soc.title: SoftBank cuts target for OpenAI margin loan by 40% to $6 billion
news-global-soc.description: The Japanese conglomerate is now seeking about $6 billion, down from the earlier $10 billion plan; Downsizing reflects hesitation among potential lenders over private AI valuations

news-global-soc.title: Goldman Sachs private credit fund’s share of bad loans rises
news-global-soc.description: Investments typically reserved for a fund’s troubled holdings now make up 4.7% of Goldman Sachs BDC Inc.’s portfolio at cost, according to a filing on Thursday

news-global-soc.title: UFO investigator warns Trump disclosure could hand sensitive military secrets to China, Russia
news-global-soc.description: The executive producer behind "S4: The Bob Lazar Story" says he does not want the government to reveal all UFO secrets due to national security.
